name: 90 Second Pizza Georgetown

notes: Every frozen row was reconciled against the current Georgetown Toast menu linked from the restaurant's official site.
All 23 frozen rows remain current: 20 are exact name matches and three are current renamed variants. The current menu adds 12 rows that were absent from the frozen catalog.
The corrected represented surface contains 35 current items in five real sections and places the nine beverage rows last.

The restaurant-issued FAQ says it does not make gluten-free pizza, uses one brick oven, and cannot guarantee a gluten-free product; this is represented as pizza cross-contact guidance rather than a fixed wheat claim.

The FAQ says peanuts and peanut oil are not used, but some supplier plants also process nut products and the restaurant cannot guarantee all products are nut-free; the supplier warning is represented as cross-contact, not as a fixed ingredient.

The corrected current catalog has 14 rows with fixed menu-text allergen signals, 12 additional rows with only the official global cross-contact caution, and nine beverage rows accurately left unavailable.
Manufacturer pages for the two named Bindi desserts were retained as ingredient-intelligence context only and were not promoted to restaurant-issued allergen evidence.
The frozen output collapsed all 23 rows into one Pizza category, omitted 12 current rows, and did not preserve the restaurant's global cross-contact guidance.
All 23 frozen rows had allergen mismatches after current FAQ cautions were applied; Campania also omitted the fish signal plainly supported by anchovies in the current menu description.
The current deterministic snapshot keeps fixed ingredient signals separate from global cross-contact guidance and leaves undisclosed beverage allergens unavailable.

sourceAttempts.outcome: Direct browser rendering succeeded, but the reproducible ledger artifact fetch returned Cloudflare HTTP 403.
notes: The restaurant-linked vendor page was reviewed directly in-browser.
A third-party text rendering of the same URL was retained separately and remains classified third_party.

sourceAttempts.outcome: The guessed location-specific path returned HTTP 404; the official home page itself identifies the Georgetown location and links its ordering menu.

findings.summary: The frozen 23-row catalog used one generic Pizza category and omitted 12 current Georgetown items, including a vegan configurable item, two desserts, and nine beverages.
findings.resolution: Replaced it with the 35-item current Georgetown catalog in Pizza, Vegan Pizza, Desserts, Miscellaneous, and Drinks, with beverages ordered last.

findings.summary: The frozen rows omitted the restaurant-issued FAQ's single-oven gluten caution and supplier nut-processing caution from every applicable item.
findings.resolution: Represented the FAQ statements as may-contain cross-contact signals, separate from fixed menu ingredients and without inventing negative safety claims.

findings.summary: Campania was labeled only for milk even though the current restaurant-linked description explicitly lists anchovies.
findings.resolution: Added fish to Campania from the current anchovy description while retaining milk from mozzarella and parmesan.

findings.summary: Current manufacturer pages corroborate the identity and composition of two named Bindi desserts but are not restaurant-issued allergen disclosures.
findings.resolution: Retained both as ingredient_intelligence context and did not promote their information into restaurant-official allergen arrays.

repairs.summary: Prepared and targeted-tested a 35-item current Georgetown snapshot with real sections, current names, conservative fixed ingredient signals, official FAQ cross-contact semantics, and nine accurately unavailable beverage rows.
verificationCommands: RESTAURANT_REPOSITORY_PATH=/tmp/restaurant-verification-90-second-input.json node scripts/repair-final-generated-regressions.mjs (targeted copy; verified 35 unique items, five source sections, 14 fixed-signal rows, 12 global-cross-contact-only rows, nine unavailable rows, configurable Half and Half preservation, FAQ evidence attribution, Campania fish, and beverages last)

notes: Current corrected catalog counts: 35 items, 14 fixed menu-text rows, 12 global-cross-contact-only rows, and nine accurately unavailable rows.

Focused catalog parsing, complete frozen-row reconciliation, targeted repair-copy, unique-id, category-order, source-authority, cross-contact, configurable-item, and evidence-attribution checks passed.
